profile.loadError: We could not load your account data from the server. Please check your connection and try again.
profile.noTrips: You don't have any booked trips yet.
profile.logoutSuccess: See you on your next trip.
profile.supportEmptyDesc: When you send a request through the Contact page, it will appear here for tracking.
profile.supportAwaitingReply: Our team will respond as soon as possible.
profile.supportReplyPlaceholder: Add more information for the support team...
profile.supportCanReplyLater: You can add more information after our team replies.
profile.passwordPolicyError: Password must be at least 8 characters with an uppercase, lowercase, number and special character
profile.setPasswordHint: Optional — add a password for an extra email sign-in method.

my_bookings.title: Your Journeys
my_bookings.subtitle: Manage your upcoming trips and past adventures.
my_bookings.loadErrorDescription: There is a connection issue. Try loading again to continue managing your trips.
my_bookings.emptyAllDescription: Trips you book will appear here with tickets, departure schedules, and pickup information.
my_bookings.emptyUpcomingDescription: Newly scheduled journeys will appear here so you can prepare.
my_bookings.emptyUnpaidDescription: All current bookings have been handled or no longer require payment.
my_bookings.emptyConfirmedDescription: Paid and confirmed bookings will appear here.
my_bookings.emptyCompletedDescription: After each journey, you can return here to review its details.
my_bookings.emptyCancelledDescription: Your journeys currently have no cancellation requests or cancelled bookings.
my_bookings.firstJourney: Let's start your first journey with us.
my_bookings.noTicketsStatus: No tickets found tracking this status.
my_bookings.messagePaymentRequired: Complete payment to secure your booking
my_bookings.messagePaymentExpired: This booking passed its payment deadline; the held seats are no longer reserved
my_bookings.messagePaymentFailed: Payment was unsuccessful, please try again
my_bookings.messageCancelRequested: Your cancellation request is being processed
my_bookings.messageCancelled: This booking is no longer active
my_bookings.plsPayLbl: Please pay to secure your booking
my_bookings.noteFullRefund24h: 100% refund for cancellations within 24h of booking.
my_bookings.noteEightyRefund: 80% refund for cancellations made 7+ days before departure.
my_bookings.noteHalfRefund: 50% refund for cancellations made 3 to under 7 days before departure.
my_bookings.noteNoRefund: No refund (cancellation under 3 days before departure).
my_bookings.noteTodayNoCancel: Online cancellation is not available on the departure date.
my_bookings.noteTripCompleted: This trip has been completed and can no longer be cancelled.
my_bookings.ticketBlockedTitle: Complete passenger details to receive tickets
my_bookings.ticketBlockedDesc: Flight-inclusive tours require complete details for all passengers (matching their ID) before tickets are issued. {count} passenger(s) still need details.
my_bookings.passengerIncompleteWarn: {count} passenger(s) still need details — please add them before departure.
my_bookings.paymentExpiredCountdown: Payment time expired ({minutes} min over). The booking was auto-cancelled.
my_bookings.inStoreDesc: Please bring your booking code to the office to complete payment and receive tickets within 24 hours of booking.
my_bookings.reviewingPaymentDesc: We've received your reconciliation request. If you've already transferred, there's no need to create another payment or cancel the tour while we verify.
my_bookings.paidWaitBeforeCancel: If you've already transferred, please wait for the reconciliation result before cancelling to avoid a refund-status mix-up.
